title: The American Dream
description: This mod adds machine guns, snipers, pistols, bullets, Kevlar, new armor, tools, and a new structure called the Tower of Doom.
body:
This mod adds **weapons**, **armor**, **structures**, and a good time! With the new guns, you can obliterate bosses, mobs, and your foes long-range or in a duel! The Machine Gun can help you do this but in an automatic manner.

**ARMOR**
Kevlar Armor crafted from Raw Kevlar deep within caves (Ore generation only happens when installing the mod, creating a new world). Use this armor for a better advantage on tough bosses, and your foes in PvP.

The new advancement messages give you a sense of achievement, and accomplishment for succeeding and reaching milestones with this mod! In short, you should download this for a good time solo, or with your friends! Laugh at the new additions to the game, and be amazed by what this mod can do!

Please leave your comments, questions, concerns, and general feedback on the following website:
https://sites.google.com/view/theamericandreamcomment/home
